mechanism_narrative: Positive momentum in nominal retail sales signals resilient household spending and near-term revenue support for cyclically exposed index constituents, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:April 2016 retail sales vintage value was available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day SPX returns, with Rank IC below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals deterioration in household income and recession risk, reducing expected earnings and risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:April 2016 unemployment rate vintage value was 5.0 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances have positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional mean returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate increases discount rates and tightens financial conditions, compressing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25 percentage points over 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:April 2016 federal funds rate vintage value was 0.37 percent
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX returns following FEDFUNDS increases of at least 25 basis points are not lower than returns in non-tightening months, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts combined with a low or stable federal funds rate signals credit-supported real activity, boosting construction, durable-goods demand, and earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 3-month growth is positive and FEDFUNDS has not risen by more than 0.10 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:March 2016 housing starts and April 2016 federal funds values were available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not outperform cases where HOUST rises while FEDFUNDS also rises, or if triggered 60-day returns are below the unconditional mean in more than half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals weakening goods-sector output and operating leverage pressure, lowering expected earnings growth and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below its 6-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:March 2016 industrial production vintage value was available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 65% of triggered instances and triggered mean returns are not lower than non-triggered mean returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices combined with a rising federal funds rate signals inflation pressure that forces tighter policy, raising discount rates and reducing equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds its prior 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:March 2016 CPI and April 2016 federal funds values were available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term between CPIAUCSL acceleration and FEDFUNDS change has a non-negative coefficient in walk-forward regressions, or if triggered 20-day returns are not below baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth with unemployment at or below normal levels signals durable income growth without immediate labor-market stress, supporting consumption and earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average monthly gain exceeds 150 thousand and UNRATE is at or below 5.5 percent
evidence_refs: fact:April 2016 payroll employment and unemployment rate values were available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered 5-day SPX returns are not positive more often than the unconditional hit rate, or if the PAYEMS-UNRATE interaction has Rank IC below 0.02 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A material slowdown in real GDP growth signals broad demand deceleration that lowers aggregate earnings expectations and increases recession-risk pricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth falls below 1 percent and is lower than the prior quarter
evidence_refs: fact:2016 Q1 real GDP vintage value was available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have 60-day SPX returns above the unconditional mean or if the negative relation between GDPC1 growth deceleration and returns is not statistically significant at p < 0.10.
